evals.name: adr-generation
evals.prompt: Create an ADR for switching from REST to GraphQL for our internal dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A document using the 'Context -> Decision -> Consequences' pattern with clear trade-off analysis.

evals.name: mermaid-visualization
evals.prompt: Document our user signup flow which involves an email verification step.
evals.expected_output: Technical description accompanied by a Mermaid.js sequence or flowchart diagram.
